description: Optional paid/third-party feed schema for Smart Money Whale Agent v2.2

dark_pool.total_volume: number; total market volume used for denominator
dark_pool.dark_pool_pct_total_volume: number; 42.0 means 42% of total volume; alternative to ratio
dark_pool.large_block_trade_count: number; count of large block prints
dark_pool.large_block_volume: number; total volume from large block prints
dark_pool.large_block_value_usd: number; total USD value from large block prints
dark_pool.largest_block_value_usd: number; largest single block print value
dark_pool.block_price_vs_vwap_pct: number; block print price compared with VWAP; positive = above VWAP
dark_pool.repeated_print_ratio: number; repeated prints / all block prints, 0.18 = 18%
dark_pool.off_exchange_trend_5d: number; 5-day change in off-exchange activity, percentage points or provider score
dark_pool.dark_pool_buy_volume: number; estimated buyer-initiated dark-pool volume if provider supports aggressor side
dark_pool.dark_pool_sell_volume: number; estimated seller-initiated dark-pool volume if provider supports aggressor side
dark_pool.dark_pool_net_bias: number; -1 to +1; positive = buy bias, negative = sell bias
